channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 2 Jun: Harare overcast · high 20° / low 10°
item.description: Harare: high 20°, low 10° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 20°, low 10° (light drizzle) · Mutare: high 21°, low 11° (light drizzle) · Gweru: high 20°, low 11° (overcast) · Masvingo: high 22°, low 11° (overcast) · Victoria Falls: high 25°, low 12° (partly cloudy) Tsumo yezuva: Nhamo yeumwe hairambirwi sadza. (Another’s troubles don’t stop you from eating.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
